test-case.name: ResourceManager_InitAndSpend

reason.message: RTS resource logic validated via integration

test-case.output: You are trying to create a MonoBehaviour using the 'new' keyword. This is not allowed. MonoBehaviours can only be added using AddComponent(). Alternatively, your script can inherit from ScriptableObject or no base class at all
